economic_notes: Business partnerships include 1328914 Cardlock Limited Partnership, Ahahswinis Green Investments Ltd., HFN Environmental Waste Disposal Services Limited Partnership, Kleekhoot Gold Limited Partnership, Tsuma-as Tseafoods Limited Partnership, and Upnit Power Limited Partnership. Net losses from business partnerships were $117,305 in 2024.
notes: Qualified audit opinion issued for two reasons: (1) Social Housing tangible capital assets amortized at rate equivalent to annual principal reduction of related long-term debt rather than over estimated useful lives per PSAS; (2) Council did not formally approve the budget for the year ending March 31, 2024, so budgeted figures are not presented in the financial statements. Six government business enterprises accounted for under modified equity method. Five funds consolidated: Operating, Trust, Social Housing, Enterprise, and Treaty. Auditor's report dated August 30, 2023 which appears inconsistent with a March 31, 2024 fiscal year end. total_government_transfers estimated from Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council + Province of BC + DFO + Grants + CMHC + First Nation Education Steering Committee + School District #70 + First Nations Health Authority.
